creator: andriys@gmail.com
text:
Build of net/samba410 from the ^/branches/2019Q4 (current quarterly branch) fails with the following error:

===>  Building package for samba410-4.10.11
pkg-static: Unable to access file /construction/xports/net/samba410/work/stage/usr/local/lib/samba4/modules/vfs/glusterfs_fuse.so:No such file or directory
pkg-static: Unable to access file /construction/xports/net/samba410/work/stage/usr/local/man/man8/vfs_glusterfs_fuse.8.gz:No such file or directory
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make: stopped in /xports/net/samba410


And this feels to be the reason the samba410 PACKAGE HAS DISAPPEARED FROM THE OFFICIAL QUARTERLY PACKAGE REPO.
